text:
Komiya (コミヤ, Komiya) is a servant of Prince Tubeppa. Jump Ryu! Vol. 21 - Togashi's notes 

Trivia

Komiya's name, affiliation, and occupation were revealed in one of the characters sheets shown during Togashi's interview for Jump Ryu! Vol. 21.
